title: Health Canada’s corporate management reporting - Canada.ca
content:
## Health Canada’s corporate management reporting
Access corporate management reports on evaluations, plans and priorities, performance, finances and audits.
Access annual reports on the department’s priorities, programs, expected results and expenditure plans.

### Departmental Results Report
Discover the departmental results report used to measure performance against what is outlined in the reports on plans and priorities.

### Quarterly financial reports
Explore quarterly financial reports, including year-to-date highlights, information on risks, and changes to operations, personnel and programs.
Learn about internal audits on resources, systems, processes, structures and operational tasks.
Access annual fees reports which describe the listing of all fees, service standards and performance results, and financial information.

### Sustainable Development
Learn more about Health Canada’s sustainable development commitments. Access departmental sustainable development reports and public statements on proposals that have undergone the Strategic Environmental and Economic Assessment.

### Forced labour in Canadian supply chains
Access annual reports on how Health Canada is preventing and reducing the risk of forced labour and child labour in Canadian supply chains.

### Addressing Misconduct and Wrongdoing Annual Reports
Access annual reports on our ongoing efforts to address misconduct and wrongdoing in the workplace.
